design_system.description: A futuristic, high-performance automation and marketing agency. The design should feel like a 'command center' or a high-tech interface (HUD).

headings.usage: Use for all H1-H3. Tight tracking for large text.

body.usage: Use for paragraphs, UI elements, data inputs.

mono.usage: Use for code snippets, tiny labels, data tags, and decorative 'terminal' elements.

motion.scroll: Parallax effects on background elements. Fade-in-up for content.

elements: Visual: 3D spline object or Abstract Cyan Network background

services.cards: Glassmorphism cards with hover glow effects. Icons should be neon/tech style.

pricing.highlight: Professional Plan (700k) should have a 'Cyberpunk' border glow.

portfolio.style: High contrast thumbnails with hover-reveal details.

testimonials.style: Large text moving slowly, or cards in a carousel.

admin_dashboard.style: HUD / Terminal interface. Dark background, monospace data, clear grid lines.

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-white hover:bg-primary/90 rounded-none skew-x-[-10deg] (Tech look)
buttons.secondary: border border-primary/50 text-primary hover:bg-primary/10 rounded-none skew-x-[-10deg]
buttons.floating_whatsapp: Fixed bottom-right, distinct green or brand cyan, pulsing glow.

cards.service_card: bg-secondary/30 border border-white/5 hover:border-primary/50 transition-colors p-8 relative overflow-hidden group

inputs.style: bg-black/50 border-white/10 focus:border-primary/50 text-white rounded-md h-12

icons.style: Stroke width 1.5, sharp or rounded depending on context.

instructions_to_main_agent: FORCE DARK MODE: The application must be permanently in dark mode. Do not implement a light mode toggle.
NAVIGATION: Use a sticky glassmorphism header with the logo on the left and a 'Get Started' button on the right.
HERO SECTION: Use the 'hero_bg' image as a background with an overlay gradient to ensure text readability.
PRICING: Display prices in ARS (Argentine Pesos). '300k' means $300,000.
CONTACT: Implement the contact form to save messages to the backend. The Admin Panel should fetch and display these.
WHATSAPP: Add a floating button that links to https://wa.me/5491135921999.
ADMIN: Simple auth (or just hidden route for MVP) to view messages. Use a table layout.
NO DEFAULT SHADCN LOOK: Customize the radius to be smaller (rounded-sm or rounded-md) and use the specified color palette.
universal_guidelines: Do not use gradients for dark colors.
Avoid generic centered layouts; use asymmetry.
